inputs.label: Measured Value
inputs.businessContext: Actual measurement result (e.g., measured dimension of the manufactured part)

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual measurement result (e.g., measured dimension of a manufactured part)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçekleşen ölçüm sonucu (örn. üretim parçasının ölçülen boyutu)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener Wert (z. B. gemessene Abmessung des produzierten Teils)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résultat de mesure réel (ex. dimension mesurée d'une pièce de production)
businessContext_i18n.es: Resultado de medición real (p. ej., dimensión medida de la pieza producida)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نتيجة القياس الفعلية (مثل البعد المقاس لقطعة الإنتاج)

inputs.label: Reference Value
inputs.businessContext: Accepted reference or theoretical value (nominal measurement)

businessContext_i18n.en: Accepted reference or theoretical value (nominal measurement)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kabul edilen referans veya teorik değer (nominal ölçü)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de référence ou théorique acceptée (mesure nominale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de referencia o teórico aceptado (medida nominal)
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المرجعية أو النظرية المقبولة (القياس الاسمي)

inputs.label: Tolerans (%)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable percentage error limit (quality control limit)

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable percentage error limit (quality control limit)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kabul edilebilir yüzde hata sınırı (kalite kontrol limiti)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite d'erreur acceptable en pourcentage (limite de contrôle qualité)
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite de error porcentual aceptable (límite de control de calidad)
businessContext_i18n.ar: حد الخطأ المئوي المقبول (حد مراقبة الجودة)

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Standard uncertainty of the measurement process (for k=1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard uncertainty of the measurement process (for k=1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude type du processus de mesure (pour k=1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre estándar del proceso de medición (para k=1)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم اليقين المعياري لعملية القياس (لـ k=1)

inputs.label: Coverage Factor (k)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for expanded uncertainty; typically 2 for 95% confidence

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient for expanded uncertainty; typically 2 for 95% confidence
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genişletilmiş belirsizlik için katsayı; %95 güven için tipik olarak 2
businessContext_i18n.de: Koeffizient für erweiterte Unsicherheit; typischerweise 2 für 95 % Konfidenz
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient pour l'incertitude élargie ; typiquement 2 pour un niveau de confiance de 95 %
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente para incertidumbre expandida; típicamente 2 para 95% de confianza
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل عدم اليقين الموسع؛ عادة 2 لثقة 95%

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
